data.title: e.l.f. Takes Over the NWSL with New Talent, New Cities and New Partnerships to Connect with Fans in 2026
data.description: In Oakland, California, e.l.f. Beauty's brands e.l.f. Cosmetics and e.l.f. SKIN, listed under NYSE as ELF, along with the National Women's Soccer League (NWSL), are extending their three-year partnership for the second year. The expansion in 2026 includes tapping into soccer's emerging talent and venturing into two additional markets. The primary goal is to enhance influence, elevate perspectives, and foster prospects for the upcoming empowered female athletes. The addition of Ally Sentnor and entry into Kansas City are part of e.l.f.'s efforts to support women in sports.

data.title: KuCoin Among Top Exchanges for Derivatives Market Share Growth in February: CoinDesk Data
data.description: In March 13, 2026, in Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands, it was reported that the worldwide crypto derivatives market saw a slight decrease in activity during February. This occurred despite a rise in competition among major exchanges, as highlighted in the most recent CoinDesk Data Exchange Review for February 2026. The industry witnessed a slowdown, with important figures reflecting the trend.

data.title: Honda cancels plans for electric vehicles as startups proceed. Traditional carmakers face divide in EV industry.
data.description: A Japanese company recently announced its decision to pull back, joining numerous other established automakers in responding to the industry's shift towards electric vehicles. As more companies separate into those embracing electric vehicles and those falling behind, this move signifies a larger trend within the automotive sector.

data.title: Impact of Iran War on global supplies: Beyond oil and gas, the conflict disrupts shipping and airfreight, endangering various goods.
data.description: Apart from impacting oil and gas markets, the ongoing conflict in the Middle East is causing disruption in shipping and airfreight industries. This has put at risk the supply of numerous goods across various sectors.

data.title: US using powerful lasers to defend against Iranian attacks. Lasers can destroy drones in the sky but face challenges with weather and mass production.
data.description: Powerful lasers have the capacity to incinerate drones in mid-air akin to a blowtorch. However, their effectiveness can be hindered by adverse weather conditions, presenting a barrier to their operation. Additionally, mass production of these lasers poses a significant challenge due to technical constraints.

data.title: German industry faces threat due to rising energy costs post Ukraine conflict, with new challenges from Iran war.
data.description: Four years following the Russian invasion of Ukraine, which caused energy prices to sharply rise, the ongoing war in Iran is presenting a new obstacle to the revival of European factories. The conflict in Iran is hindering the efforts to boost manufacturing across Europe.

data.title: $10K EigenCloud challenge unveils 5 AI agents utilizing TEEs for trust verification - from whistleblowing to negotiations.
data.description: EigenCloud hosted an innovation challenge with a $10,000 prize, resulting in the development of AI agents that showcase their honesty using Trusted Execution Environments. These agents are utilized across various platforms such as whistleblower systems and automated negotiation processes. For further details, click on the link provided.

data.title: Historic Rugby Kicks Off 2026 Irish Road Bowling Season with Tennessee's First Solo Male State Qualifier Tryouts
data.description: In Norris, Tenn., the tradition of Irish Road Bowling, a centuries-old sport, will be revived at Historic Rugby for the 2026 season starting on March 21. This event welcomes both players and spectators to enjoy this distinctive outdoor tradition. With origins dating back to the 17th century, Irish Road Bowling offers a historical and engaging experience for all involved. Be sure not to miss out on this opportunity to participate in or witness this traditional activity that has stood the test of time. Mark your calendars for the starting date on March 21 and join in on the excitement as individuals come together to celebrate this cherished sport.

data.title: ‘Clair Obscur: Expedition 33’ Dominates 26th Annual Game Developers Choice Awards With Five Wins Including Game of the Year
data.description: A major event in the gaming industry was the recent announcement of "Clair Obscur: Expedition 33" as the Game of the Year at the 26th annual Game Developers Choice Awards in San Francisco. The game stood out among tough competition to secure this prestigious title, solidifying its position in the industry. The Game Developers Choice Awards are a significant recognition platform for the gaming sector, with the annual event drawing attention from both industry insiders and gaming enthusiasts alike. This accolade further highlights the success and impact of "Clair Obscur: Expedition 33" in the gaming landscape, showcasing its popularity and excellence in game development.
